title: [CI:DOCS]: Update the demos README file to fix minor typos
body:
#### What type of PR is this?
Minor documentation updated to the demos README.md file. Fixes two minor issues
1. Incorrect spelling of 'Here'
2. Inconsistency of 'Quay.io'

/kind documentation

#### What this PR does / why we need it:
Fixes minor documentation issues for clarity.

#### How to verify it
Read the demos README documentation page

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:
None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
Demos documentation will have correct spelling.

```release-note
Minor updates to demos documentation page
```

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

comments.body: @pixdrift Could you add `[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]` to commit ?

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *flouthoc*, *pixdrift* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [flouthoc] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

Ok if Quay.io refers to itself this way, then fine. 
LGTM

> @pixdrift Could you add `[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]` to commit ?

Sorry, wasn't aware of this, will take note for future commits. 👍
